name: MacFlex
description: Whether you're planetside or in vacuum, RSI's MacFlex industrial armor set has your back. Reinforced plating keeps you safe from environmental hazards while the array of pouches keep your tools accessible. == Armor components == == Editions == === Rust Society Edition === The Rust Society Edition celebrates blue-collar workers with an exclusive red and tan coloration that hides dirt and wear and tear well. It was given out in individual parts (i.e. Arms, Legs, Torso, Helmet, undersuit), one per month, as Subscriber Flair to Imperator-Level backers. Current subscribers can retro-actively purchase the flair in the store. == Gallery ==

name: ADP
description: == Product description == "Revolutionary when first released, the ADP heavy armor system was heralded as the pinnacle of personal protection. Clark Defense Systems' maximalist design provides plenty of attachment points and excellent protection against the elements and enemy fire. CDS refined and reshaped the ADP line over the years, but many still consider the original ADP to be the touchstone of military-grade heavy armor." == Armor components == == Model == === Variations === (All are available in-game only) == Gallery == == References ==

name: ADP-mk4
description: The ADP-mk4 is a heavy armor developed by Clark Defense Systems for the UEE Marine Corps. Its maximalist design provides plenty of attachment points and excellent protection against the elements and enemy fire. CDS refined and reshaped the ADP line over the years, but many still consider the original ADP to be the touchstone of military-grade heavy armor. == Armor components == == Model == === Variations === (All are available in-game only) === Special editions === == Gallery == == References ==

name: ORC-mkV
description: Clark Defense Systems' ORC-mkV armor has been a trusted and enduring choice on the battlefield for centuries. This medium armor is highly regarded for its dependable and durable construction, which combines composite plating with a special fiber reinforced polymer. The result is a solid level of protection that allows for a wide range of movement. The ORC-mkV is a prime example of how dependable and durable armor never goes out of style, and continues to be a staple for those who require reliable protection in high-risk situations. == Armor components == === Variations ===

name: ORC-mkX
description: The mark X is the latest in CDS' award-winning Omni-Role Combat armor series. This EVA-rated suit features new EdgeCore composite weave technology, maximizing protection against projectiles, explosives and the elements while minimizing operator agility. == Armor components == == Armor variants ==

name: PAB-1
description: Clark Defense Systems built the PAB-1 light but strong enough to stay in a fight. The first CDS suit to utilize their proprietary nano-weave, this light armor became a favorite of those who needed a little extra protection while remaining agile. == Armor components ==

name: FBL-8a
description: The FBL-8a set is an armor set manufactured by Clark Defense Systems. There are currently three color variants available. No helmet belongs to the armor set as of the current LIVE build, but the Mandible Helmet is believed to be the one. == In-game description == CDS's quest to create the ideal light armor continues with the FBL-8a. This light armor will keep you fast on your feet with its strategic mix of protective plating and reinforced nano-weave fabrics. While the armor works with any undersuit, it was specifically designed to match the FBL-8u undersuit with special attention given to how the two fit together to make the set as streamlined and responsive as possible. == Model == === Variations === (All are available in-game only) == Armor components == == Development == The FBL-8a set was introduced in Alpha 3.11.1 in the Intergalactic Aerospace Expo 2950 event. == References ==

name: Field Recon Suit
description: CDS' Field Recon Suit is the perfect solution for the combat operator who wants a little extra protection without compromising any of their situational agility. EdgeCore composite plating is strategically sewn into the nano-weave suit to cover vital organs while keeping the suit flexible. == Armor components ==

name: Antium
description: The Antium is a heavy armor set manufactured by Quirinus Tech. == In-game description == If you're in need of top-of-the-line protection enhanced with bleeding-edge technology, look no further than the Antium Armor Set. Developed by the award-winning engineering team at Quirinus Tech, the suit is fully enclosed to protect its wearer against hazardous environments and the dangers of the battlefield. Instead of a traditional laminate faceplate, the helmet utilizes a suite of sensors to create an uncompromised field of vision. == Armor components == == Regular Models == == Special Models == == Gallery ==

name: Arden-SL
description: The Arden-SL armor set is a set of light armor manufactured by Roussimoff Rehabilitation Systems. The whole set, including the TBF-4 Combat Knife and a CitizenCon 2951 Trophy, was handed out for free to all backers for CitizenCon 2021. The set edition handed out was the dark red "Balefire" edition. == Product description == "With its excellent design and eye-catching style, the Arden-SL armor exemplifies why security specialists love Roussimoff Rehabilitation Systems. This versatile armor set lets the wearer stay agile but safe thanks to the precise placement of special composite armor plating and fabrics. It also features a toolbelt for easy access to important gear." == Armor components == == Model == == Gallery == == References ==

name: Aril
description: The Aril medium armor set is manufactured by Greycat Industrial. It was originally designed for miners and includes a fully enclosed helmet and high collar providing additional support and protection for the neck and back of the head. An integrated tool belt and attachable backpack can accommodate a variety of tools and supplies to keep the user's hands free. == Armor components == === Variations === === Special editions === == History == The Aril armor set was designed by the Greycat Industrial engineer and designer Ruben Pardue in the 24th Century. It was designed to help workers in the Uriel tunnel collapse by incorporating new safety features and advanced alloy plating. It was his first design in his career at the company and had set the standard for Greycat products going forward. It had become a huge success and remains a bestseller for Greycat today, with only minimal changes made

name: Artimex
description: The Artimex is a medium armor set manufactured by Quirinus Tech. == Description == Blending durability and a striking style, the Artimex armor exemplifies the Quirinus aesthetic. This intricately detailed armor considers both form and function, especially when paired with the fully enclosed helmet that features a neon ocular flourish. The armor also comes with a unique cowl that fans over the helmet and a knee length fitted cape. == Armor components == == Armor variants == == Special variants == == Gallery == == Development == == References ==

name: Aves
description: The Aves Armor, made by CC's Conversions, was designed with Tevarin aesthetic elements. The helmet was used in conjugation with the flyable sale of the Esperia Prowler and the full set was free as a part of the Talon warbond concept sales. == Product Description == "Honor and embody the Tevarin aesthetic with the Aves armor. Cutting edge manufacturing techniques were used to place white, red, grey, and black plating perfectly to fit the Human form and evoke the shape language imbued into the Tevarin’s iconic ships. This medium armor from CC’s Conversions is both sensational and practical, providing solid protection while keeping you light on your feet. When paired with the Aves helmet, the suit combines for a striking and unforgettable look." == Acquisition == Armour was first introduced with the Esperia Prowler. This armour set was included in the Concept Warbond sales of the Talon and

name: AVS-E
description: The AVS-E armor set is an armor set manufactured by United Empire of Earth Navy (UEEN). It is used by the combat pilots in the UEEN. It is featured in Squadron 42 and not available in the Persistent Universe at the moment. == In-game description == The AVS-E is a unique armor set designed to integrate seamlessly with the OMNI-CFS series of flightsuits. The AVS features component armor plating, strategically placed to protect vital areas, but also integrates numerous pouches to keep you equipped in the field. == Armor components == == Gallery == == References ==

name: Aztalan
description: The Tehachapi Aztalan is a light armor set. Its line of personal body armor provides strategic protection of vital areas while keeping the bearer fast and mobile. It is a small production armour set produced by Tehachapi employing a mixture of plating and reinforced polymer weaves. This armour set was made famous in 2946, when featured in a Spectrum show, Shadow Siren, by the main character, Déraciné, making the company famous and a trending fad. == In-game description == Fear no frontier while wearing the Aztalan armor. This mixture of armor plating and reinforced fabrics will keep you safe yet swift on your feet. Tehachapi's masterful design gives the armor a subtle yet unmistakable frontier style that also providing ample storage. Suitable for everything from sand dunes to bustling backstreets, the Aztalan is the ideal choice for your next adventure. == Armor components == == Model ==

name: Bastion (armor set)
description: The Bastion armor set is a light armor set manufactured by Greycat Industrial. It consists of the Foundation Undersuit, Bastion Helmet, Bastion Core, Bastion Arms, Bastion Legs. It is marked as a Odin Munitions Corporation (OMC) armor in its game item ID, suggesting that it is being used in Squadron 42. As of Alpha 3.12.0, it is not available in game. == In-game description == Work harder for longer with GreyCat's award-winning Bastion safety harness. Featuring a reinforced composite harness and pads, the Bastion provides your workers with affordable impact protection that are capable of surviving the harshest of environments. == Armor components == == Gallery == == References ==

name: Calico
description: Designed to be an EVA-compliant light combat suit, the Calico set is the perfect armor suit for infiltrators, snipers, thieves, basically anyone who likes to avoid kicking in doors. Built out of a combination of PAB-3 armor and a custom helmet, it can help you weather some incoming fire without slowing you down. == Gallery == == Armor components ==

name: Carrion
description: The Carrion medium armor set was added in Update:Star Citizen Alpha 4.3.2 and can be assumed to be sold by Grey's Market. == Product Description == "Insert the text of the quote here, without quotation marks." == Model == === Variations === Payback (part of CC2025 Goodies Pack) == Gallery == == References ==

name: Citadel
description: The Citadel is a three-piece heavy armor set manufactured by Kastak Arms. == Armor variants == == Gallery == == Development == == References ==

name: Clash (armor set)
description: The Clash armor set is a medium armor set manufactured by Doomsday. == In-game description == Sometimes all you gotta do is put on the right piece of armor to make your message loud and clear. Clash armor first started popping up when the Dredge got strong-armed into mass-producing their armor and it's been scaring everyone stupid since. Now everybody's stealing it. Clash features a reinforced medium plating to get you a good balance of protection without giving up too much speed. == Armor components == == Development == The Clash armor set is introduced in Alpha 3.4.0 as a part of the Shipjacker (Clash) armor set. == References ==

name: Corbel
description: A heavy utility armor set manufactured by the Clark Defense Systems. == Armor components == == Armor variants == == Gallery == == References ==

name: Defiance
description: Incorporating the same manufacturing know-how and expertise that the UEE Marines have come to rely on, Clark Defense Systems has designed their civilian-line of Defiance heavy armors to stand firm in the face of even the most adverse combat scenarios with its three-star rated protective plating and fully integrated mobility framework. == Armor components == === Armor variants ===

name: Dust Devil
description: TheDust Devil is a heavy armor set. Salvaged pieces of disused protective gear were welded together to make this intimidating armor set. The cape, made from an old Banu wall-hanging, adds an elegant finishing touch. == Armor components == == Model == === Special editions === == Gallery == == References ==

name: DustUp
description: The Kastak Arms DustUp is a medium armor set. Its body plating is built off of the same CDS undersuit used by the UEE Marines, it adds reconstructed Omni-Role mkII pieces to give the player solid protection against incoming fire, but the real gem is the modified helmet. It was built to withstand explosions and vacuum. == Gallery == == Armor components == === Variations === == References ==

name: Geist Epoque
description: The Kilgore and Poole Geist Epoque is a light armor set decorated with navy blue and black colors and gold baroque gold detailing that combines the helmet of the Aztalan armor set with the core, arms and legs of the Geist Stealth armor set and the CSP-68L Backpack. == In-game description == == Armor components == == Model == === Special Variants === == Gallery == == Trivia == The Geist Epoque was given to players as a Twitch drop to the players who met the conditions between the 20th of November and the 3rd of December, 2025. == References ==

name: Geist Stealth
description: The Geist Stealth Armor has been crafted from military-grade carbon silk sourced from the same manufacturers that protect the UEE's special forces. Hair-thin filaments woven into the fabric mask the wearer's emissions, making them undetectable via radar, and specialized tubing built into the soles of the boots dampens the sound of footsteps. An ideal synthesis of strength and technology, specialized for stealth gameplay, with high mobility. Armor components can be collected at Onyx Facilities. == Armor components == == Armor variants == === Special editions === == References ==

name: Inquisitor
description: The Kastak Arms Inquisitor is a medium armor set. == Product description == Strength and speed combine with the new Inquisitor armor set. Strong yet lightweight alloy plating works alongside reinforced polyfiber weaving to save your skin, but not slow you down. When combined with Kastak Arms' intimidating aesthetic, it's easy to see why this medium armor has become infamous across the Empire. == Armor components == === Variations === === References ===

name: Lynx (armor set)
description: Maintain your mobility with the Lynx combat armor. A high tech polymer weave allows the wearer to withstand enough damage to quickly escape danger. The suit's striking look became famous after being worn by the Seeker in the widely popular "Fire and Fury" vids of the mid-2800s. == Armor components ==

name: Microid Battle Suit
description: The Kastak Arms Microid Battle Suit is a entry-level light armor set. Ceramic plates protect vital areas while a microweave covers the rest, allowing the player to stay light, mobile and protected. The full set is only lootable as of 3.17.1. == Armor components == == Gallery == == Trivia == There's a mannequin wearing the Microid Battle suit at the CIG HQ in Manchester. == References ==

name: Morozov-SH
description: The Roussimoff Morozov-SH is a heavy armor set. Featuring fortified armor plating, special anti-rip protective padding and ample storage, the Morozov-SH is ready to overcome all kinds of adversity. After consulting with security professionals, RRS added a unique high protective collar and a lightweight inner lining based on their recommendation; making the Morozov-SH both comfortable and a battlefield stalwart. == Armor components == == Model == === Special editions === == Gallery == == References ==

name: Odyssey II
description: The Odyssey II Undersuit is a rugged, dependable flightsuit that comes in several different color combinations. As of Alpha 3.3.7, this is part of the player's default loadout, in the "Alpha" color scheme. == In-game description == "The latest generation of RSI's classic Odyssey undersuit features a new rugged design capable of withstanding the harshest of conditions in space or planetside. Built using the latest microweave technology, the Odyssey II undersuit provides hours of comfort in locations that are anything but comfortable."in-game description == Armor Components == == Development == == Trivia == RS1 Odysey Spacesuits appear to be a rip-off version of this product, and are Prohibited Goods within Crusader Industries Jurisdiction. A full sized mannequin of the Odyssey suit was made by Mangostone. == Gallery == == References ==

name: Overlord
description: Doomsday's Overlord Suit is an armor set modeled resembling the Overlords outlaw group. == Product description == Some consider the Overlords heroes and other criminals. Doomsday doesn't care either way. All we know is that the vigilante group that made a name for itself targeting outlaws in Pyro has some kickass, distinct, and resilient armor. Since we respect the rule of law as much as they do, we made a limited run of armor inspired by them. If they have a problem with it, they can come find us. The Overlord armor lets your foes know that you mean business. This heavy armor set is constructed with durable composite plating strategically placed to disperse the force of impacts and a high, reinforced collar that provides additional protection for your neck and back of head. The suit also layers in high-strength synthetic fabrics around the joints to ensure ease of moment without sacrifi

name: Palatino
description: A "Battle Tech" heavy armor set manufactured by Quirinus Tech. == Product description == "Elegant design meets innovation with the Palatino armor from Quirinus Tech. The fully-enclosed helmet comes equipped with a suite of sensors that connects the wearer to the wider world while providing supreme protection." == Armor components == == Armor variants == == Special variants == == Gallery == == References ==

name: Regal-CS1
description: Regal-CS1 is a light armor set manufactured by Roussimoff Rehabilitation Systems. It is marked as a Shubin Interstellar security uniform in its game item ID, suggesting that it is being used by the security staff on the Archon Base in Squadron 42. As of Alpha 3.12.0, it is not available in game. == Armor components == == References ==

name: Sol-III
description: A flight suit with open-face helm and EVA thrusters. == Product Description == "The Aviator edition is primarily green-beige with light green accents." == Model == === Variations === Aviator (part of CC2955 Digital Goodies pack) == Gallery == == References ==

name: Stitcher
description: Stitcher is a make-do-and-mend inspired medium armor set from manufacturer Doomsday. == Product description == Dress to impress in scrapheap chic! The Stitcher armor might look like it's held together with tape and good intentions but we swear it's space safe. The intentional ramshackle design features a funky double collar, plenty of storage, and a ribbed industrial hose attached to a metal cylinder on the back just for the hell of it. == Armor components == == Gallery == == References ==

name: Strata
description: Strata is a medium armor manufactured by Greycat Industrial. The Strata armor with the branding of one of the four Stanton system mega-corporations is a reward for participating in the Second Life Resource Drive, the base variant after reaching Tier 2 and the black variant after reaching Tier 5. Other Strata armor sets are available on the pledge store. == Armor components == == Armor variants == == References ==

name: TrueDef-Pro
description: The Virgil TrueDef-Pro is a light armor set. Its line of personal body armor provide strategic protection of vital areas while keeping the player fast and mobile. Numerous planetary law enforcement organizations and even the Advocacy use versions of the TrueDef to protect their officers and agents. It is combat equivalent of the RSI Venture armor. Where the Venture armor is designed primarily for space operations, the TrueDef Pro pieces offer a similar level of added protection (20% armor boost) while maximizing speed and mobility for ground forces. The most significant difference between the two is that where the RSI suit focuses on allowing natural visibility with a 'glass cockpit' style HUD, the TrueDef-Pro armor includes the famed Argus helmet that covers the eyes and adds the possibility of additional optical enhancements. == Armor components == == Trivia == It was originally meant

name: Venture
description: The RSI Venture light armor set is built for the unknown. Its EVA-rated protection system features an undersuit built from a durable polymer weave that's designed to withstand extreme environmental conditions and features component armor pieces to protect you against impacts and particulates. It is akin to the outer space version of a diver's skinsuit: it's designed primarily to protect from the vacuum rather than to serve as a bonus in combat. As such, it prioritizes visibility and range of motion over physical blocking (though it does offer a 20% increase in overall protection). The Venture suit is perfect for the average spacecraft pilot more concerned about hull breaches than needing to engage in first person combat. == Armor components == == Editions == == Development == Venture was one of the very first sets completed by CIG, and it has appeared in a variety of ship commercials and

name: Wrecker
description: The Wrecker heavy armor set was added in Update:Star Citizen Alpha 4.3.2 and can be assumed to be sold by Grey's Market. == Product Description == "Insert the text of the quote here, without quotation marks." == Model == === Variations === Payback (part of CC2025 Goodies Pack) == Gallery == == References ==

name: Xanthule
description: The Xanthule flight suit manufactured by Syang Fabrication, of the Xi'an Syang House, is a result of centuries of innovation, that has been meticulously tailored to fit the Human physique. This sleek and stylish suit showcases breathable lightweight plating, crafted with a carbon-silk weave, ensuring reliable protection without compromising the renowned aesthetic of the House. == Armor components == == Model == === Special editions === == Buyable at == == Gallery == == Development == == Trivia == == References ==
